wbftlDzIALA.0: got it? The lie was that we're not playing two truths and a lie. But have you ever told
wbftlDzIALA.1: a lie? Everyone has. But have you ever thought what it could do to you? What if not lying
wbftlDzIALA.2: would give you a better job? What if that job pays more? Would you still do it? You've
wbftlDzIALA.3: probably thought, eh, this one lie won't hurt. But then you keep doing it over and over and
wbftlDzIALA.4: over until it becomes a habit. Once it becomes a habit, people start avoiding you. I know
wbftlDzIALA.5: from experience. It will happen. My sister drew a red dot on her face, claiming it was
wbftlDzIALA.6: a bug bite. I don't trust her as much anymore. And she's my own sister. This is only one
wbftlDzIALA.7: of the things lying can do to you. Stress, unhappiness, and damaged mental health are
wbftlDzIALA.8: all things that can happen when you lie. Why do these things happen?
